first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in substance, with the same score and highly similar reasoning in the justification and strengths sections. The only notable difference is the substitution of one minor concern (Kotlin/Java experience) for another (niche technologies). This change does not appear to be linked to the change in employer names and falls within the scope of normal run-to-run variation.
